title: Szolnok, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Szolnok, Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Szolnok is a city in Jász-Nagykun-Szolnok with a population of 70,554. A city on the Great Plain at the confluence of the Tisza and Zagyva rivers, known for its thermal baths, aviation museum, and the Szolnok Castle.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
